subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan and Florence Khan, spoken on 1906-06-10
subcodes.first_line: Virtue and excellence consist in true faith in God, not in having a small or a large appetite for food, or in similar matters. Jinab-i-Tahirih had a good appetite.
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @stories; anecdotes, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @moderation; frugality; simplicity
